entries.description: ***NOTICE TO ATTORNEY REGARDING DEFICIENT VOLUNTARY DISMISSAL. Notice to Attorney Russell Busch. RE-FILE Document No. 27 Notice of Voluntary Dismissal. The filing is deficient for the following reason(s): the wrong filer/filers was/were selected for the voluntary dismissal (Do Not Select Any Group); the wrong party/parties whom the voluntary dismissal is against was/were selected (Do Not Select Any Group). Re-file the document using the event type Notice of Voluntary Dismissal found under the event list Notices - select the correct filer/filers - select the correct party/parties the voluntary dismissal is against - and attach the correct signed PDF. (tp)

NOTICE OF VOLUNTARY DISMISSAL pursuant to Rule 41(a)(1)(A)(i) of the Federal Rules of Civil Procedure, the plaintiff(s) and or their counsel(s), hereby give notice that the above-captioned action is voluntarily dismissed, without prejudice and without costs against the defendant(s) Kalshi Inc., Kalshi Klear Inc., Kalshi Klear LLC, Kalshi Trading LLC, KalshiEX LLC. Document filed by Tyrone Stuckey, Luis Cuevas, Brett Josephson, Temuujin Shaariibuu. Proposed document to be reviewed and processed by Clerk's Office staff (No action required by chambers)...(Busch, Russell) (Entered: 05/20/2026)

FILING ERROR - DEFICIENT DOCKET ENTRY - FILER ERROR - NOTICE OF VOLUNTARY DISMISSAL pursuant to Rule 41(a)(1)(A)(i) of the Federal Rules of Civil Procedure, the plaintiff(s) and or their counsel(s), hereby give notice that the above-captioned action is voluntarily dismissed, without prejudice and without costs against the defendant(s) All Defendants. Document filed by All Plaintiffs. Proposed document to be reviewed and processed by Clerk's Office staff (No action required by chambers)...(Busch, Russell) Modified on 5/20/2026 (tp). (Entered: 05/19/2026)
NOTICE OF CASE REASSIGNMENT to Judge Jennifer L. Rochon. Judge Unassigned is no longer assigned to the case. (tro)

Magistrate Judge Robert W. Lehrburger is designated to handle matters that may be referred in this case. Pursuant to 28 U.S.C. Section 636(c) and Fed. R. Civ. P. 73(b)(1) parties are notified that they may consent to proceed before a United States Magistrate Judge. Parties who wish to consent may access the necessary form at the following link: https://nysd.uscourts.gov/sites/default/files/2018-06/AO-3.pdf. (tro)
CASE ACCEPTED AS RELATED. Create association to 1:25-cv-08585-JLR. Notice of Assignment to follow. (tro)

CASE REFERRED to Judge Jennifer L. Rochon as possibly related to 1:25-cv-08585-JLR. (vba)

MINUTE entry before the Honorable Lindsay C. Jenkins: The motion to transfer 8 is granted. See the attached order for further details. The clerk is directed to transfer the case under 28 USC sec. 1404(a) to the United States District Court for the Southern District of New York forthwith. Civil case transferred. Mailed notice.
